commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human/contributor action is needed to rebase or split the branch, decide the provider-default scope, and provide current-head live proof; automation cannot supply external proof or make that product/API decision.; Needs attention: The diff does not add new third-party code execution, but it does change release/package metadata and scripts in a way that needs supply-chain review before merge.; Review finding:... (sha=aaae92599ee584bf50c342088e5f117a2295126c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a typed ContextEngineRuntimeSettings contract, threads it through context-engine lifecycle hooks for embedded, CLI, and Codex app-server paths, updates SDK exports/docs/tests, and also carries unrelated release/package and Copilot model-id changes.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature/API PR; there is no bug reproduction target. Source inspection shows current main lacks the runtimeSettings contract, while the PR adds and tests it.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human/contributor action is needed to rebase or split the branch, decide the provider-default scope, and provide current-head live proof; automation cannot supply external proof or make that product/API decision.

target.title: feat(context-engine): pass runtime settings into lifecycle
target.body:
## Summary

AI-assisted change: yes. Forge/Codex produced the implementation and PR shepherding with OpenAI `gpt-5.5`; ragesaq reviewed the direction and required production-grade proof before merge.

Pass a typed `ContextEngineRuntimeSettings` contract through the context-engine lifecycle for embedded, CLI, and Codex app-server runs. Context engines now receive a versioned snapshot of runtime mode, model/provider state, host capabilities, token limits, and diagnostics instead of only the assemble-time `model` string.

## Changes

- Add `ContextEngineRuntimeSettings` and `ContextEngineRuntimeMode` in `src/context-engine/types.ts`.
- Add `buildContextEngineRuntimeSettings()` in `src/context-engine/runtime-settings.ts`.
- Thread `runtimeSettings` through bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, compact, and maintenance paths.
- Export the runtime-settings contract and errors through the public plugin SDK barrel.
- Preserve strict legacy context engines: if an engine rejects `runtimeSettings` as an unknown key, OpenClaw retries the lifecycle call without it instead of quarantining the engine.
- Document the public context-engine runtime-settings contract in `docs/concepts/context-engine.md` and `docs/plugins/sdk-overview.md`.
- Update the plugin SDK export contract test for the new public runtime-settings error exports.
- Add configured-slot proof that a resolved context engine receives runtimeSettings across bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, maintenance, and compact.
- Preserve the same overflow compaction runtimeSettings into the immediately-following post-compaction maintenance call.

## Current Head

Current PR head: `aaae92599e8afc993c495d4d2559f89b761d3325`.

This branch currently includes Anvil's unrelated Gemini model-id commit `747f09e19610`. I did not force-rewrite or remove another agent's commit without operator approval, so this PR is still broader than the runtime-settings branch should ideally be.

## Review Findings Addressed

- [P1] Strict-schema legacy engines could quarantine on the new `runtimeSettings` key. Fixed by adding `runtimeSettings` to the registry legacy strip/retry set for bootstrap, maintain, afterTurn, assemble, and compact. Covered by focused compatibility tests. Commit: `4e201a70e7`.
- [P1] Current-head configured-plugin proof was missing. Added `passes runtime settings through a configured context engine across lifecycle hooks`, which registers an engine, resolves it through `plugins.slots.contextEngine`, and verifies runtimeSettings on bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, maintenance, and compact. Commit: `50de7a46e4`.
- [P2] Overflow compaction built runtimeSettings for `compact()` but dropped them on immediate post-compaction maintenance. Fixed by reusing the same runtimeSettings object for both calls and covering the handoff in `run.overflow-compaction.test.ts`. Commit: `aaae92599e`.
- [P2] `model.family` could mirror a concrete model id. Fixed by defaulting family to `null` unless a real family is supplied. Covered by regression tests. Commits: `6cd24ab8fd`, `c4f5d721ff`.
- [P2] SDK contract was exported but not documented. Fixed by documenting `runtimeSettings` in context-engine docs and SDK overview. Commit: `4e201a70e7`.
- [P2] `compact()` documented `runtimeSettings`, but real compact callers did not pass it. Fixed embedded timeout/overflow compaction, queued/manual embedded compaction, CLI compaction, and follow-up maintenance to pass typed runtime settings. Commits: `5ea3873f00`, `aaae92599e`.
- [P2] Production embedded paths did not populate requested/resolved/fallback/degraded fields. Fixed embedded attempts to capture requested model and pass fallback metadata through bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, and maintenance. Commit: `5ea3873f00`.
- CI failure in `checks-fast-contracts-plugins-b`: fixed `src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-index.test.ts` to include `ContextEngineRuntimeSettingsUnavailableError` and `ContextEngineRuntimeSettingsUnsupportedError`. Commit: `5ea3873f00`.
- Copilot: `fallbackReason` and `fallbackActive` could be inconsistent. Fixed by deriving `fallbackActive` from any non-empty fallback reason. Covered by regression test. Commit: `4e201a70e7`.
- Copilot: runtime-settings Error subclasses lacked names. Fixed. Commit: `6cd24ab8fd`.
- Copilot: missing builder test branches for degraded mode and invalid capabilities. Fixed. Commit: `4e201a70e7`.

## Current-Head Proof

Environment: OpenClaw source tree for this PR branch, run locally against current head `aaae92599e8afc993c495d4d2559f89b761d3325`. Proof output is sanitized: no home paths, tokens, private endpoints, or raw transcripts are included here.

Commands run at current head:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-index.test.ts src/context-engine/context-engine.test.ts src/context-engine/runtime-settings.test.ts src/agents/harness/context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts
pnpm check:test-types
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.contracts-plugin.config.ts --maxWorkers=1
pnpm build
git diff --check
```

Observed result:

```text
plugin-sdk-index.test.ts: 4 passed
context-engine.test.ts: 42 passed
runtime-settings.test.ts: 6 passed
context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts: 12 passed
run.overflow-compaction.test.ts: included in focused agent shard; focused agent shard 52 passed
pnpm check:test-types: exit 0
contracts-plugin config: 64 files, 893 tests passed
pnpm build: exit 0, including check-plugin-sdk-exports OK
git diff --check: clean
```

Configured context-engine proof added in `context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts`:

- registers a test context engine with bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, maintain, and compact hooks
- resolves that engine through `plugins.slots.contextEngine`
- drives the resolved engine through bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn/finalization maintenance, and compact timeout wrapper
- asserts every captured hook receives schema version 1 runtimeSettings
- asserts fallback mode, requested/resolved model split, provider, `family: null`, `fallbackActive: true`, and `fallbackReason`

Overflow compaction proof added in `run.overflow-compaction.test.ts`:

- drives overflow recovery through the embedded runner harness
- asserts the same runtimeSettings object reaches engine-owned overflow `compact()` and follow-up `runContextEngineMaintenance()`
- asserts post-compaction maintenance sees degraded mode and `degradedReason: "context_overflow"`

Compatibility proof added in `context-engine.test.ts`:

- strict legacy `assemble()` retries without `sessionKey`, `prompt`, and `runtimeSettings`
- strict legacy `bootstrap()` retries without `runtimeSettings`
- strict legacy `maintain()` retries without `runtimeSettings`
- strict legacy `afterTurn()` retries without `runtimeSettings`
- strict legacy `compact()` retries without `runtimeSettings`

Runtime-settings proof added in `runtime-settings.test.ts` and `context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts`:

- `model.family` defaults to `null` and never mirrors a concrete model id
- explicit `modelFamily` is preserved when supplied
- `fallbackReason` forces `fallbackActive: true` and `runtime.mode: "fallback"`
- `degradedReason` yields `runtime.mode: "degraded"`
- invalid host capabilities fail closed with `ContextEngineRuntimeSettingsUnsupportedError`

## Compatibility and Risk

`runtimeSettings` remains optional on every lifecycle hook param. Engines that ignore it continue unchanged. Engines with strict unknown-field validation now get the same compatibility retry behavior OpenClaw already uses for legacy `sessionKey` and `prompt` additions.

Remaining scope risk: the branch still contains the unrelated Copilot Gemini model-id rename from `747f09e19610`. That should either be accepted as part of this PR with maintainer approval or split out with an explicit branch rewrite.

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-index.test.ts src/context-engine/context-engine.test.ts src/context-engine/runtime-settings.test.ts src/agents/harness/context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts` -> pass, focused shards including 52 agent tests.
- `pnpm check:test-types` -> pass.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.contracts-plugin.config.ts --maxWorkers=1` -> pass, 893 tests total.
- `pnpm build` -> pass.
- `git diff --check` -> clean.

## Operator Understanding

ragesaq asked for proof from actual use before merge, called out that labels still required proof/triage proof, then asked for PR follow-up and cleanup. The stale PR body and earlier overclaim have been corrected: addressed findings now point to current-head commits and validation, configured context-engine proof is now permanent test coverage, overflow post-compaction maintenance keeps runtimeSettings, and the unrelated-commit scope risk is stated directly instead of hidden.
target.author: ragesaq

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

Added `passes runtime settings through a configured context engine across lifecycle hooks`, which registers an engine, resolves it through `plugins.slots.contextEngine`, and verifies runtimeSettings on bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, maintenance, and compact. Commit: `50de7a46e4`.
- [P2] Overflow compaction built runtimeSettings for `compact()` but dropped them on immediate post-compaction maintenance. Fixed by reusing the same runtimeSettings object for both calls and covering the handoff in `run.overflow-compaction.test.ts`. Commit: `aaae92599e`.
- [P2] `model.family` could mirror a concrete model id. Fixed by defaulting family to `null` unless a real family is supplied. Covered by regression tests. Commits: `6cd24ab8fd`, `c4f5d721ff`.
- [P2] SDK contract was exported but not documented. Fixed by documenting `runtimeSettings` in context-engine docs and SDK overview. Commit: `4e201a70e7`.
- [P2] `compact()` documented `runtimeSettings`, but real compact callers did not pass it. Fixed embedded timeout/overflow compaction, queued/manual embedded compaction, CLI compaction, and follow-up maintenance to pass typed runtime settings. Commits: `5ea3873f00`, `aaae92599e`.
- [P2] Production embedded paths did not populate requested/resolved/fallback/degraded fields. Fixed embedded attempts to capture requested model and pass fallback metadata through bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, and maintenance. Commit: `5ea3873f00`.
- CI failure in `checks-fast-contracts-plugins-b`: fixed `src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-index.test.ts` to include `ContextEngineRuntimeSettingsUnavailableError` and `ContextEngineRuntimeSettingsUnsupportedError`. Commit: `5ea3873f00`.
- Copilot: `fallbackReason` and `fallbackActive` could be inconsistent. Fixed by deriving `fallbackActive` from any non-empty fallback reason. Covered by regression test. Commit: `4e201a70e7`.
- Copilot: runtime-settings Error subclasses lacked names. Fixed. Commit: `6cd24ab8fd`.
- Copilot: missing builder test branches for degraded mode and invalid capabilities. Fixed. Commit: `4e201a70e7`.

## Current-Head Proof

Environment: OpenClaw source tree for this PR branch, run locally against current head `aaae92599e8afc993c495d4d2559f89b761d3325`. Proof output is sanitized: no home paths, tokens, private endpoints, or raw transcripts are included here.

Commands run at current head:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-index.test.ts src/context-engine/context-engine.test.ts src/context-engine/runtime-settings.test.ts src/agents/harness/context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts
pnpm check:test-types
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.contracts-plugin.config.ts --maxWorkers=1
pnpm build
git diff --check
```

Observed result:

```text
plugin-sdk-index.test.ts: 4 passed
context-engine.test.ts: 42 passed
runtime-settings.test.ts: 6 passed
context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts: 12 passed
run.overflow-compaction.test.ts: included in focused agent shard; focused agent shard 52 passed
pnpm check:test-types: exit 0
contracts-plugin config: 64 files, 893 tests passed
pnpm build: exit 0, including check-plugin-sdk-exports OK
git diff --check: clean
```

Configured context-engine proof added in `context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts`:

- registers a test context engine with bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, maintain, and compact hooks
- resolves that engine through `plugins.slots.contextEngine`
- drives the resolved engine through bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn/finalization maintenance, and compact timeout wrapper
- asserts every captured hook receives schema version 1 runtimeSettings
- asserts fallback mode, requested/resolved model split, provider, `family: null`, `fallbackActive: true`, and `fallbackReason`

Overflow compaction proof added in `run.overflow-compaction.test.ts`:

- drives overflow recovery through the embedded runner harness
- asserts the same runtimeSettings object reaches engine-owned overflow `compact()` and follow-up `runContextEngineMaintenance()`
- asserts post-compaction maintenance sees degraded mode and `degradedReason: "context_overflow"`

Compatibility proof added in `context-engine.test.ts`:

- strict legacy `assemble()` retries without `sessionKey`, `prompt`, and `runtimeSettings`
- strict legacy `bootstrap()` retries without `runtimeSettings`
- strict legacy `maintain()` retries without `runtimeSettings`
- strict legacy `afterTurn()` retries without `runtimeSettings`
- strict legacy `compact()` retries without `runtimeSettings`

Runtime-settings proof added in `runtime-settings.test.ts` and `context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts`:

- `model.family` defaults to `null` and never mirrors a concrete model id
- explicit `modelFamily` is preserved when supplied
- `fallbackReason` forces `fallbackActive: true` and `runtime.mode: "fallback"`
- `degradedReason` yields `runtime.mode: "degraded"`
- invalid host capabilities fail closed with `ContextEngineRuntimeSettingsUnsupportedError`

## Compatibility and Risk

`runtimeSettings` remains optional on every lifecycle hook param. Engines that ignore it continue unchanged. Engines with strict unknown-field validation now get the same compatibility retry behavior OpenClaw already uses for legacy `sessionKey` and `prompt` additions.

Remaining scope risk: the branch still contains the unrelated Copilot Gemini model-id rename from `747f09e19610`. That should either be accepted as part of this PR with maintainer approval or split out with an explicit branch rewrite.

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-index.test.ts src/context-engine/context-engine.test.ts src/context-engine/runtime-settings.test.ts src/agents/harness/context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts` -> pass, focused shards including 52 agent tests.
- `pnpm check:test-types` -> pass.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.contracts-plugin.config.ts --maxWorkers=1` -> pass, 893 tests total.
- `pnpm build` -> pass.
- `git diff --check` -> clean.

## Operator Understanding

ragesaq asked for proof from actual use before merge, called out that labels still required proof/triage proof, then asked for PR follow-up and cleanup. The stale PR body and earlier overclaim have been corrected: addressed findings now point to current-head commits and validation, configured context-engine proof is now permanent test coverage, overflow post-compaction maintenance keeps runtimeSettings, and the unrelated-commit scope risk is stated directly instead of hidden.

target.title: feat(context-engine): pass runtime settings into lifecycle
target.body:
## Summary

AI-assisted change: yes. Forge/Codex produced the implementation and PR shepherding with OpenAI `gpt-5.5`; ragesaq reviewed the direction and required production-grade proof before merge.

Pass a typed `ContextEngineRuntimeSettings` contract through the context-engine lifecycle for embedded, CLI, and Codex app-server runs. Context engines now receive a versioned snapshot of runtime mode, model/provider state, host capabilities, token limits, and diagnostics instead of only the assemble-time `model` string.

## Changes

- Add `ContextEngineRuntimeSettings` and `ContextEngineRuntimeMode` in `src/context-engine/types.ts`.
- Add `buildContextEngineRuntimeSettings()` in `src/context-engine/runtime-settings.ts`.
- Thread `runtimeSettings` through bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, compact, and maintenance paths.
- Export the runtime-settings contract and errors through the public plugin SDK barrel.
- Preserve strict legacy context engines: if an engine rejects `runtimeSettings` as an unknown key, OpenClaw retries the lifecycle call without it instead of quarantining the engine.
- Document the public context-engine runtime-settings contract in `docs/concepts/context-engine.md` and `docs/plugins/sdk-overview.md`.
- Update the plugin SDK export contract test for the new public runtime-settings error exports.
- Add configured-slot proof that a resolved context engine receives runtimeSettings across bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, maintenance, and compact.
- Preserve the same overflow compaction runtimeSettings into the immediately-following post-compaction maintenance call.

## Current Head

Current PR head: `aaae92599e8afc993c495d4d2559f89b761d3325`.

This branch currently includes Anvil's unrelated Gemini model-id commit `747f09e19610`. I did not force-rewrite or remove another agent's commit without operator approval, so this PR is still broader than the runtime-settings branch should ideally be.

## Review Findings Addressed

- [P1] Strict-schema legacy engines could quarantine on the new `runtimeSettings` key. Fixed by adding `runtimeSettings` to the registry legacy strip/retry set for bootstrap, maintain, afterTurn, assemble, and compact. Covered by focused compatibility tests. Commit: `4e201a70e7`.
- [P1] Current-head configured-plugin proof was missing. Added `passes runtime settings through a configured context engine across lifecycle hooks`, which registers an engine, resolves it through `plugins.slots.contextEngine`, and verifies runtimeSettings on bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, maintenance, and compact. Commit: `50de7a46e4`.
- [P2] Overflow compaction built runtimeSettings for `compact()` but dropped them on immediate post-compaction maintenance. Fixed by reusing the same runtimeSettings object for both calls and covering the handoff in `run.overflow-compaction.test.ts`. Commit: `aaae92599e`.
- [P2] `model.family` could mirror a concrete model id. Fixed by defaulting family to `null` unless a real family is supplied. Covered by regression tests. Commits: `6cd24ab8fd`, `c4f5d721ff`.
- [P2] SDK contract was exported but not documented. Fixed by documenting `runtimeSettings` in context-engine docs and SDK overview. Commit: `4e201a70e7`.
- [P2] `compact()` documented `runtimeSettings`, but real compact callers did not pass it. Fixed embedded timeout/overflow compaction, queued/manual embedded compaction, CLI compaction, and follow-up maintenance to pass typed runtime settings. Commits: `5ea3873f00`, `aaae92599e`.
- [P2] Production embedded paths did not populate requested/resolved/fallback/degraded fields. Fixed embedded attempts to capture requested model and pass fallback metadata through bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, and maintenance. Commit: `5ea3873f00`.
- CI failure in `checks-fast-contracts-plugins-b`: fixed `src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-index.test.ts` to include `ContextEngineRuntimeSettingsUnavailableError` and `ContextEngineRuntimeSettingsUnsupportedError`. Commit: `5ea3873f00`.
- Copilot: `fallbackReason` and `fallbackActive` could be inconsistent. Fixed by deriving `fallbackActive` from any non-empty fallback reason. Covered by regression test. Commit: `4e201a70e7`.
- Copilot: runtime-settings Error subclasses lacked names. Fixed. Commit: `6cd24ab8fd`.
- Copilot: missing builder test branches for degraded mode and invalid capabilities. Fixed. Commit: `4e201a70e7`.

## Current-Head Proof

Environment: OpenClaw source tree for this PR branch, run locally against current head `aaae92599e8afc993c495d4d2559f89b761d3325`. Proof output is sanitized: no home paths, tokens, private endpoints, or raw transcripts are included here.

Commands run at current head:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-index.test.ts src/context-engine/context-engine.test.ts src/context-engine/runtime-settings.test.ts src/agents/harness/context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts
pnpm check:test-types
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.contracts-plugin.config.ts --maxWorkers=1
pnpm build
git diff --check
```

Observed result:

```text
plugin-sdk-index.test.ts: 4 passed
context-engine.test.ts: 42 passed
runtime-settings.test.ts: 6 passed
context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts: 12 passed
run.overflow-compaction.test.ts: included in focused agent shard; focused agent shard 52 passed
pnpm check:test-types: exit 0
contracts-plugin config: 64 files, 893 tests passed
pnpm build: exit 0, including check-plugin-sdk-exports OK
git diff --check: clean
```

- registers a test context engine with bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, maintain, and compact hooks

- strict legacy `bootstrap()` retries without `runtimeSettings`
